detailedDescription: The ASUS Prime H510M-K motherboard features the Intel H510 chipset with LGA 1200 socket support. This Micro-ATX form factor board supports up to 64GB of DDR4 RAM across 2 slots. Equipped with PCIe 4.0 expansion slots, 1 M.2 slots, and 4 SATA ports for extensive storage options. Connectivity includes USB 3.2 Gen 1 ports and is ideal for budget-conscious builders requiring essential features.
additionalSpecs: LGA 1200 | Intel H510 Chipset | Micro-ATX | 2x DDR4 Slots (Max 64GB) | 1x M.2 Slots | 4x SATA Ports | USB 3.2 Gen 1
